narrative:
Scott Township (precinct in Adams County) has 752 registered voters, with 45.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.7 percentage points.
